message.thinking:
We need to produce JSON array with 3 objects. Each object has keys: "question" with value "Chapters", "Description", "Structure" accordingly. Provide feedback and compliance boolean.

We need to evaluate the provided text against the questions:

1. Chapters: Does the text list the main sections of the thesis? The text includes "Analītiskā daļa" and "Praktiskā daļa". That seems to list main sections. So yes.

2. Description: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? The text lists bullet points under each part. So yes.

3. Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? The text shows two main parts with bullet lists. It might be understandable. So yes.

We should note any issues: maybe missing introduction, literature review, methodology, results, discussion, conclusion. But the question is about the provided text. It lists main sections and describes them. So compliance is true for all.

Provide feedback: mention strengths and maybe note that introduction and other sections not included but that's fine.

Return JSON array with 3 objects. Ensure no extra text.
